metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins — presentation building and security review

plugins.name: presentation-skill
plugins.description: Build polished slide decks using pptxgenjs. Runs an intake questionnaire, generates .pptx with proper narrative structure, and performs a visual QA loop.

plugins.name: security-review
plugins.description: General-purpose security review agent backed by Trivy. Pre-install scans, orchestrator sub-agent, and PR security review with gh CLI.
